targets.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT ON (src) src AS mac, fields->>'name' AS name, rssi_dbm AS rssi, fields->>'services' AS services, fields->>'manufacturer_data' AS manufacturer_data, fields->>'tx_power' AS tx_power, MIN(ts) AS first_seen, MAX(ts) AS last_seen, COUNT(*) AS adv_count FROM headers WHERE protocol = 'ble' AND fields->>'frame_type' IS NULL AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY src, fields->>'name', rssi_dbm, fields->>'services', fields->>'manufacturer_data', fields->>'tx_power' ORDER BY src, last_seen DESC;
SELECT time_bucket('1 minute', ts) AS time, COUNT(DISTINCT src) AS unique_macs, COUNT(*) AS total_adverts FROM headers WHERE protocol = 'ble' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT src AS device_mac, fields->>'name' AS device_name, (fields->>'service_count')::int AS services, (fields->>'characteristic_count')::int AS characteristics, (fields->>'security_findings')::int AS findings, ts AS enumerated_at FROM headers WHERE protocol = 'ble' AND fields->>'frame_type' = 'gatt_enum' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 50;

SELECT ts AS time, src AS target_mac, fields->>'frame_type' AS event_type, CASE WHEN (fields->>'ltk_recovered')::boolean THEN 'LTK Recovered' WHEN (fields->>'tk_recovered')::boolean THEN 'TK Recovered' ELSE 'Capture Only' END AS result FROM headers WHERE protocol = 'ble' AND fields->>'frame_type' IN ('pair_crack', 'connection_hijack', 'mitm', 'unauth_write') AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 100;

SELECT COALESCE(SUBSTRING(src FROM 1 FOR 8), 'Unknown') AS vendor_prefix, COUNT(DISTINCT src) AS device_count FROM headers WHERE protocol = 'ble' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY vendor_prefix ORDER BY device_count DESC LIMIT 15;
